description.en: Everything you need to know about roofing screws with EPDM washers — types, sizing, installation techniques, and weatherproofing for metal roof construction in tropical climates.
description.zh: 关于EPDM垫圈屋顶螺丝你需要知道的一切——类型、尺寸、安装技术，以及热带气候金属屋顶建设的防水处理。
description.es: Todo lo que necesita saber sobre tornillos para tejado con arandelas EPDM: tipos, dimensiones, técnicas de instalación.
description.ar: كل ما تحتاج معرفته عن مسامير السقف مع حلقات EPDM: الأنواع والأحجام وتقنيات التركيب.
description.fr: Tout ce que vous devez savoir sur les vis de toiture avec rondelles EPDM : types, dimensions et techniques d'installation.

description.ru: Всё, что нужно знать о кровельных саморезах с шайбами EPDM: типы, размеры и техника установки.
description.ja: EPDMワッシャー付き屋根ネジについて知っておくべきすべて—種類、サイズ、設置技術。
description.de: Alles, was Sie über Dachschrauben mit EPDM-Dichtscheiben wissen müssen: Typen, Größen und Installationstechniken.
description.hi: EPDM वॉशर वाले छत स्क्रू के बारे में वह सब कुछ जो आपको जानना चाहिए।

keywords: roofing screws, EPDM washer screws, metal roof fasteners, self-drilling roof screws, hex washer head screws

body.en: EPDM (Ethylene Propylene Diene Monomer) rubber washers are the industry standard for roofing screw weatherproofing. The EPDM washer creates a compression seal between the screw head and the roofing panel, preventing water ingress through the fastener hole. Quality EPDM washers are UV-stabilized and maintain their elasticity for 15-20 years in direct sunlight exposure, making them essential for metal roofing in tropical and subtropical regions. The washer is bonded to a galvanized steel backing plate that distributes clamping force evenly and prevents the rubber from extruding under pressure. Two common washer sizes exist: 14mm diameter for standard corrugated roofing and 19mm or larger for standing seam and insulated panel applications. When sourcing roofing screws for African and Middle Eastern markets, always verify that the EPDM washer is UV-resistant and meets relevant standards such as ASTM D1418 or equivalent.
body.zh: EPDM（三元乙丙）橡胶垫圈是屋顶螺丝防水的行业标准。EPDM垫圈在螺丝头和屋顶板之间形成压缩密封，防止水分通过紧固件孔渗入。优质EPDM垫圈经UV稳定处理，在阳光直射下可保持弹性15-20年。垫圈粘合在镀锌钢背板上，均匀分布夹紧力。两种常见垫圈尺寸：14mm用于标准瓦楞屋顶，19mm或更大用于直立缝和保温板应用。采购时务必验证EPDM垫圈具有UV抗性。

body.en: Roofing screws are classified by head type, thread type, and drill point capacity. The most common head style is the hex washer head (HWH) with integrated EPDM washer, which provides both driving torque and weatherproofing in one component. Stitcher screws have a smaller pan head with separate EPDM washer for side-lap connections. Thread types include standard spaced thread for metal-to-wood and fine thread for metal-to-metal connections. The drill point is critical — it must be long enough to penetrate all layers of material before the threads engage. A #1 drill point penetrates up to 2mm of steel, #2 up to 3mm, and #3 up to 5mm. For typical metal roofing over purlins, a #10×1" screw with #1 drill point is standard for 0.4-0.5mm roofing sheets. For thicker insulated panels, #12×2" or longer screws with #2 or #3 drill points are required. Always specify drill point capacity when ordering to prevent installation failures.
body.zh: 屋顶螺丝按头型、螺纹类型和钻点能力分类。最常见的头型是带EPDM垫圈的一体化六角垫圈头。拼接螺丝有较小的盘头配独立EPDM垫圈。螺纹类型包括标准间距螺纹（金属到木材）和细牙（金属到金属）。钻点至关重要——必须在螺纹啮合前穿透所有材料层。1号钻点穿透2mm钢，2号3mm，3号5mm。标准金属屋顶常用#10×1"配1号钻点。保温板需#12×2"或更长配2/3号钻点。

body.en: Proper installation technique is the single most important factor in preventing roof leaks at fastener points. The key principle is to achieve proper compression of the EPDM washer without over-driving or under-driving the screw. The EPDM washer should be visibly compressed but not bulging beyond the metal backing plate. Over-driving crushes the washer and creates a gap, while under-driving leaves the seal incomplete. Use an adjustable clutch screw gun rather than a drill driver to control torque precisely. Set the clutch to engage at the point where the washer just begins to compress. Install screws perpendicular to the roof surface — angled installation creates uneven compression and potential leak paths. In corrugated roofing, place screws in the valley (low point) rather than the crest for better water shedding. Space screws according to the roofing manufacturer's specification, typically 2-3 fasteners per linear meter along purlins. For projects in high-wind regions of Southern Africa, increase fastener density by 25-30% and consider using screws with larger washers. For more information, also see our guides on [IBR nails](/en/industry/ibr-roofing-nails-installation-guide), [self-drilling screws](/en/industry/self-drilling-screws-selection-guide), [material selection](/en/industry/galvanized-vs-stainless-steel-fasteners).
body.zh: 正确安装技术是防止紧固件处屋顶渗漏的最重要因素。关键原则是适当压缩EPDM垫圈，不过拧或欠拧。垫圈应可见压缩但不超出金属背板。过拧压碎垫圈产生间隙，欠拧密封不完整。使用可调离合螺丝枪而非电钻精确控制扭矩。垂直于屋面安装螺丝。瓦楞屋顶中将螺丝放在波谷而非波峰。按屋顶制造商规范间距安装，通常每延米2-3个。南部非洲高风区域增加25-30%紧固件密度。 欲了解更多，请参阅我们的指南：IBR屋面钉完全指南：SABS标准、安装与选型（非洲市场）, 自钻螺丝选型指南：钻头类型、材料与应用, 镀锌vs不锈钢紧固件：何时用哪个 — 完整决策指南。

q.en: How long do EPDM washers last on a roof?
q.zh: EPDM垫圈在屋顶上能使用多久？

a.en: Quality UV-stabilized EPDM washers typically last 15-20 years. In extremely hot climates (surface temperatures above 80°C), lifespan may reduce to 10-15 years. Always choose screws with UV-stabilized washers for roof applications.
a.zh: 优质UV稳定EPDM垫圈通常可使用15-20年。在极热气候（表面温度超过80°C）下，寿命可能缩短至10-15年。屋顶应用务必选择UV稳定垫圈螺丝。

q.en: Can I reuse roofing screws after removal?
q.zh: 拆除后可以重复使用屋顶螺丝吗？

a.en: No. The EPDM washer takes a compression set after installation and will not reseal properly if removed and reinstalled. Always use new screws for any re-roofing or repair work.
a.zh: 不可以。EPDM垫圈安装后会产生压缩永久变形，拆除重新安装无法再次密封。任何重铺或维修工作务必使用新螺丝。
